search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:licensescotermlicenses"$orgid$ | dedup key, startedAt | rename claimedAt as "Claimed At", editions{}.edition as "Edition", editions{}.productType as "Product Type" , mode as "Mode", duration as "Duration (In Days)" | table "Claimed At","Edition","Product Type" ,"Mode", "Duration (In Days)"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:licensescotermlicenses" $orgid$ | dedup key, startedAt| search claimedAt="$row.Claimed At$" editions{}.edition="$row.Edition$" editions{}.productType="$row.Product Type$" mode="$row.Mode$" duration="$row.Duration (In Days)$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
